verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When I'm alone with You, Lord My troubles seem to disappear. And the peace that comforts me Always comes when You are near. And Your love's too much for my heart to contain Joy too much that my feet won't refrain.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So, I dance like the rain on the roof Tell my soul that my spirit's on the loose Don't know if anyone will understand Feels like an angel's got a hold of my hand, So I dance. I dance, I dance, I dance.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When I think about the ways That You have blessed my life, I sing a song of praise and thankful tears fill my eyes, 'Cause Your love's too much for my heart to contain, Joy too much that my feet won't refrain.
